summary: Production Module testing complete. Backend APIs (19/20 tests passed) and Frontend UI fully verified. One test failure was due to test script issue (ledger entries don't expose production_id in API response), not a bug. Fixed a minor UI bug where production_output quantity was showing as negative instead of positive in Accountant Inventory Ledger tab.

success_rate.backend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 test script issue, not a bug)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 production entry during testing: PROD-20260321163140-93E1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Module fully verified. All features working: POST /api/production creates production with ledger entries, GET /api/productions returns list, stock validation works, ledger entries show correct badges (production_consume=pink, production_output=emerald). Fixed quantity display bug in Accountant Inventory Ledger tab.

backend_api.POST /api/production: PASS - Creates production entry with ledger entries
backend_api.GET /api/productions: PASS - Returns list of production records with totals
backend_api.stock_validation: PASS - Validates raw material stock before production
backend_api.invalid_firm_error: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Firm not found' message
backend_api.invalid_sku_error: PASS - Returns 400 with 'SKU not found' message
backend_api.invalid_material_error: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Raw material not found' message
backend_api.zero_quantity_error: PASS - Returns 400 with 'quantity must be at least 1' message

ledger_entries.production_consume_created: PASS - Creates production_consume ledger entry for each raw material
ledger_entries.production_output_created: PASS - Creates production_output ledger entry for finished good

frontend_ui.production_tab_visible: PASS - Production tab visible in Accountant Inventory page
frontend_ui.production_stat_card: PASS - Productions stat card shows count
frontend_ui.production_dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog opens with title 'Create Production Entry'
frontend_ui.dialog_raw_materials_section: PASS - Raw Materials to Consume section with Add Material button
frontend_ui.dialog_output_section: PASS - Output Finished Good section with SKU select and quantity
frontend_ui.dialog_optional_fields: PASS - Batch Number and Notes optional fields
frontend_ui.dialog_info_text: PASS - Shows 'Raw materials will be deducted from stock' and 'Finished good quantity will be added to stock'
frontend_ui.production_records_table: PASS - Shows Production #, Date, Firm, Output, Qty Produced, Materials Used, Batch #, Created By
frontend_ui.ledger_production_consume_badge: PASS - Pink badge for production_consume entries
frontend_ui.ledger_production_output_badge: PASS - Emerald badge for production_output entries
frontend_ui.stock_reports_production_entries: PASS - Stock Reports page shows production entries with correct badges

bug_fixed.issue: Production (Output) quantity was showing as negative (-2) instead of positive (+2) in Accountant Inventory Ledger tab
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'production_output', 'return_in', 'repair_yard_in' to the list of entry types that show positive quantities
